name: Path Equivalence: ' filename' (Leading Space)
description: The product does not properly handle filenames with leading spaces, which some systems treat as distinct from the unspaced equivalent while others strip them, allowing attackers to bypass path-based access controls through this ambiguity.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename with leading spaces that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check and the filesystem resolve the name differently, allowing access to STORAGE[file_access] that should be restricted
